change_package.title: Refactor: extract validate_email helper from UserService
change_package.diff_text:
--- a/src/user/service.py
+++ b/src/user/service.py
@@ -45,6 +45,18 @@ class UserService:
+def validate_email(email: str) -> bool:
+    """Extracted helper — no behavior change, improves testability."""
+    return bool(re.match(r'^[\w.+-]+@[\w-]+\.[\w.-]+$', email))
+
 class UserService:
     def create_user(self, data: dict):
-        if not re.match(r'^[\w.+-]+@[\w-]+\.[\w.-]+$', data['email']):
+        if not validate_email(data['email']):
             raise ValueError('Invalid email')
change_package.author_summary: Pure refactor — extracted inline regex into a named helper. No logic change, improves testability. All existing tests pass.
change_package.test_evidence: Unit tests pass: 47/47. Coverage: 91%. No new failures.
change_package.rollback_plan: Revert PR — no DB migrations, no config changes.

diff_text:

+++ b/src/user/service.py
@@ -45,6 +45,18 @@ class UserService:
+def validate_email(email: str) -> bool:
+    """Extracted helper — no behavior change, improves testability."""
+    return bool(re.match(r'^[\w.+-]+@[\w-]+\.[\w.-]+$', email))
+
 class UserService:
     def create_user(self, data: dict):
-        if not re.match(r'^[\w.+-]+@[\w-]+\.[\w.-]+$', data['email']):
+        if not validate_email(data['email']):
             raise ValueError('Invalid email')
